data.title: Profusa launches Lumee Tissue Oxygen healthcare research offerings for immediate revenue generation with products available commercially.
data.description: Commercially available research-use-only offerings now provide companies with the opportunity to quickly generate revenue through product and service sales. These offerings are designed specifically for research purposes and are accessible to businesses seeking to capitalize on this market.

data.title: Henlius reveals "Globalisation 2.0" plan and innovation roadmap at JPM 2026. Key event held in San Francisco from Jan 12 to 15.
data.description: Recently in San Francisco, the 44th J.P.Morgan Healthcare Conference (JPMHC) took place from January 12 to 15, 2026. On January 15, during the conference, Dr. Jason Zhu, Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer of Shanghai Henlius Biotech, spoke about significant advancements in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Wipro reports Q3 revenue of 235.6 billion rupees, up 5.5% YoY, with IT Services revenue at $2.635 billion. Margins improve.
data.description: Wipro Ltd (NYSE: WIT) released financial data for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, with a gross revenue of 235.6 billion rupees ($2.622 billion), marking a 5.5% increase from the previous year. The IT Services revenue grew by 0.2% year over year to $2.635 billion. Earnings per share were reported at 4 cents, meeting the anticipated figures. However, adjusted constant-currency revenue in the IT Services segment fell by 1.2% compared to the previous year. The operating margin for IT Services improved to 17.6%, a 10 basis points rise from the previous year.

data.title: Jeffs' Brands' subsidiary KeepZone AI partners with STI Ltd. for distribution of security solutions in homeland sector.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Jeffs' Brands Ltd disclosed its expansion into the global homeland security sector through advanced artificial intelligence-driven solutions. Their wholly-owned subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc., signed a non-exclusive distribution agreement with STI Ltd., an Israeli developer of homeland security technologies. This agreement enhances KeepZone's security solutions portfolio, with a specialization in under-vehicle inspection systems, explosives detection devices, and other advanced threat detection tools. Jeffs' Brands operates on the Amazon Marketplace and is listed on Nasdaq under the tickers JFBR and JFBRW.

data.title: New Haven School Choice Expo on Jan. 31 to host 1,000+ attendees for school discovery and family fun during School Choice Week.
data.description: A school expo in New Haven, Connecticut on January 31, 2026, will bring together over 1,000 attendees, including parents interested in exploring various schooling options for their children. This event aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the diverse schools available in one convenient location. The expo promises an opportunity for families to discover and select the ideal educational path for their kids amid the School Choice Week celebrations.

data.title: TraXtion showcasing DamageSpeX and TreadSpeX at NADA Show 2026 to help dealers win the appraisal battle. Aiming to eliminate expensive unknowns.
data.description: During the National Automobile Dealers Association (NADA) Show in Las Vegas on February 3-6, TraXtion is sounding an alarm for the industry. Dealers are struggling in the appraisal battle, losing ground to competitors. To combat this, TraXtion is introducing cutting-edge technology solutions. At the event, they will showcase their revolutionary products, DamageSpeX and TreadSpeX, aimed at removing costly uncertainties that hinder dealers from providing competitive pricing. This initiative seeks to address the current challenges faced by dealers in accurately assessing vehicles for sale.

data.title: Las Cruces School Fair on Jan 31 to showcase K-12 education options for parents in NM at Mesilla Valley Mall at 11:00 AM.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Las Cruces, New Mexico, a school fair will be held on January 31 at Mesilla Valley Mall starting at 11:00 AM. Parents in New Mexico can explore various school options for their children in one location. Representatives from public and private schools will be present to provide information. The fair aims to help parents make informed decisions about their kids' education. This event offers a convenient way to learn about different educational opportunities available.

data.title: Manhattan DA seeks to penalize unlicensed crypto operators with penalties including felony charges and up to 15 years in jail.
data.description: The passage of the CRYPTO Act would make it illegal for unlicensed crypto businesses to operate, leading to potential felony charges and a maximum prison sentence of 15 years for offenders.

data.title: Oakland Charter School Fair on Jan. 31st to feature 30+ tuition-free public schools for children, starting at 10 AM.
data.description: In Oakland, California, on January 16, 2026, parents have the opportunity to explore various schooling options for their children all under one roof. The Oakland School Fair will take place on Saturday, January 31st, starting at 10:00 AM at Lazear Charter Academy. Over 30 tuition-free public schools will be a part of this event, providing parents with a comprehensive overview of educational choices available in the area.

data.title: BharathCloud partners with JLL for $100M AI-ready sovereign cloud investment in India and globally.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on January 16, 2026, BharathCloud has announced their partnership with JLL to assist in establishing AI-ready sovereign cloud infrastructure in key Indian cities and certain global locations. As part of this initiative, BharathCloud plans to allocate a significant investment totaling USD 100 million for this project.

data.title: RoboSense (HKEX: 02498) ranked top in 2025 global 3D LiDAR sales for robotic lawn mowers by OFweek.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on January 16, 2026, RoboSense, a cutting-edge AI-powered robotics technology firm listed as 02498 on HKEX, was named the top leader in the global robotic lawn mower market for 2025 by OFweek based on their sales volume of 3D LiDAR technology. By utilizing the advanced digital LiDAR capabilities, RoboSense has established itself as an industry frontrunner, surpassing competition in this segment.

data.title: Trump criticizes Jamie Dimon for opposing Fed intervention; suggests Dimon profits from higher rates.
data.description: President Donald Trump once again called for a decrease in interest rates, rejecting concerns expressed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon regarding possible adverse consequences of political meddling with the Federal Reserve. Trump dismissed Dimon's warnings during a press conference at Joint Base Andrews in Maryland, alleging that Dimon may have a personal interest in advocating for higher rates since it could benefit his financial gains. The President criticized Dimon's views on the matter. More details on this story are found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stable inflation at 2.7% in December prompts Fed to hold rates, despite slight concerns. Analysts foresee potential rate cut by April. Fed stance defended against political intervention.
data.description: December's inflation report indicated that prices remained stable, with the Consumer Price Index (CPI) rising 2.7% year-over-year, the same as the previous month. Core services inflation, excluding housing, slightly decreased to 2.76%. Despite this, the Federal Reserve is unlikely to cut rates imminently, a decision supported by strategist Charlie Bilello in the face of political pressure. Chief Economist Jeffrey Roach forecasts a potential rate cut by April due to economic risks like a weakening labor market, while Chief Investment Officer Eric Teal anticipates inflation to stay within the range of 2.2% to 2.7%. Bilello has criticized outside interference in monetary policy, labeling it as dangerous "price fixing." The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: State Superintendent will attend School Choice event in Helena on Jan. 30. Hundreds to rally for educational options.
data.description: In Helena, Montana, on January 30, 2026, hundreds of students, parents, and teachers are set to gather at the Montana State Capitol to celebrate educational choices as part of School Choice Week. The event aims to showcase the achievements and obstacles faced in schools.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell's Senate letter reveals Fed's $2.5 billion renovation project details, contradicting Trump admin claims. Letter addresses $700 million overrun amid probe.
data.description: The conflict between the Trump administration and the Federal Reserve has escalated following the disclosure of information regarding the Fed's $2.5 billion renovation venture. Fed Chair Jerome Powell's letter to senators in July shed light on the renovation project, countering allegations that Powell had deceived Congress. The letter, sent after Powell's testimony before the Senate Banking Committee, addressed the project's budget exceeding by $700 million. The communication was directed to committee chair Tim Scott (R-SC) and Democratic Sen. Elizabeth, providing a detailed account of the renovation project.
